title: READABILITY: Document is_subscribed caching as Phase 1 limitation
description: relay/src/ws.rs:139-140 — The comment says subscription status is 'Cached at connect time. Re-evaluated only on reconnect, which is fine for Phase 1.' This is accurate but leaves a reader wondering: is this a known limitation that will be fixed in Phase 2, or is it intentional? CLAUDE.md section notes that Phase 3 is for subscription payments. A reader needs clarity: this is a deliberate Phase 1 shortcut that becomes incorrect in Phase 3 when subscriptions expire mid-session. Fix: expand the comment to state something like 'Phase 1 only: TODO Phase 3 will need per-request check' to make it clear this is a tracked limitation.
close_reason: P4 readability/comment items. Not blocking correctness. Deferred — file separately if prioritized.
